# TecBunny Solutions

> Technology services and custom technical solutions.

## Contact Information
- Website: https://www.tecbunny.com
- Telephone: +91-9604136010
- Email: support@tecbunny.com
- Office Address: Parse, Pernem, North Goa, 403512, Goa, India
- GSTIN: 30AAMCT1608G1ZO
- CIN: U80200GA2025PTC017488

## Main Services
- **CCTV Installation & AMC**: Professional security cameras and support plans.
- **Computer Repair & Networking**: IT support, repair, upgrading, and structured cabling.
- **Home Automation**: Smart home systems and retrofitting.
- **RFID & Access Control**: Secure smart lock installations.
- **Web Development**: Custom web application development.

## Site Navigation
- [Homepage](https://www.tecbunny.com/): Official portal and services summary.
- [About Us](https://www.tecbunny.com/about): Team profile, authorisations, founders, and business info.
- [Services](https://www.tecbunny.com/services): High-level overview of service offerings and AMC packages.
- [Contact](https://www.tecbunny.com/contact): Customer service portal with map and details.
- [Products](https://www.tecbunny.com/products): Browse CP PLUS, Zebronics, and other security and IT hardware.
